name: BATTALION OIL CORP
business: Battalion Oil Corporation is an independent energy company focused on the acquisition, production, exploration and development of onshore liquids-rich oil and natural gas assets in the Delaware Basin. It sells crude oil, natural gas, and natural gas liquids to independent marketers, major oil and natural gas companies, and gas pipeline companies.
sellsTo: major oil and natural gas companies

exposures.sentence: We are an independent energy company focused on the acquisition, production, exploration and development of onshore liquids-rich oil and natural gas assets in the U.S.

catalysts.sentence: We currently plan to commence drilling two wells in January 2027.
